summary:
Agent2 determined that the predominant inorganic components are calcium-based minerals such as calcium phosphate due to medical knowledge indicating they constitute over 80-90% of a healthy adult’s skeletal structure primarily through hydroxyapatite formation. This assessment was based heavily upon standard anatomical composition data for human skeletons emphasizing mineral content importance. \boxed{Calcium phosphates dominate the inorganic fraction forming >80%, notably via hydroxyapatite}.
